creator: freebsd@geoffgarside.co.uk
text:
Created attachment 148618
net/rabbitmq-c-devel v0.5.2 patch

Update net/rabbitmq-c-devel to v0.5.2

Poudriere testport against this and the net/pecl-amqp port reported successful installation and cleanup of both.

Maintainer address rabbitmq@ this is an alias of this freebsd@ account.

Apologies for how poorly I've maintained this port thus far, I am trying to improve myself.
